claims.quote: Through the generous support of the John S. and James L. Knight Foundation, Baptist Health Innovations has launched the Knight Foundation Fellowship for Healthcare Technology Innovation.
claims.claimText: Baptist Health Innovations offers the Knight Foundation Fellowship for Healthcare Technology Innovation (non-clinical innovation/entrepreneurship fellowship).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: This is a non-clinical healthcare technology innovation fellowship for working professionals, not a GME/ACGME clinical fellowship; aligns with Tier 3 career/professional development.
claims.limitations: Not a clinical GME fellowship; content does not match URL hint of clinical FELLOWSHIP family.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: South Florida residency (applicant must currently reside in one of these four South Florida counties: Miami-Dade County, Broward County, Palm Beach County or Monroe County).
claims.claimText: Applicants must currently reside in Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, or Monroe County.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Eligibility constraint of a Tier 3 innovation fellowship for working professionals.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Bachelor’s degree or higher required (at least three years of professional experience and/or graduate-level work).
claims.claimText: Requires bachelor's degree or higher with at least three years of professional experience or graduate-level work.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Eligibility constraint for the Tier 3 innovation fellowship.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Employed full-time (at least three years post-academic enrollment).
claims.claimText: Applicants must be employed full-time, at least three years post-academic enrollment.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Employment-based eligibility consistent with Tier 3 working-professional fellowship.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: The program is designed for physicians, healthcare professionals and administrators, researchers, IT professionals, designers, engineers and other professionals.
claims.claimText: Program audience includes physicians, healthcare professionals, administrators, researchers, IT, designers, engineers.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Audience is working professionals including physicians at career stage — Tier 3.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: The yearlong fellowship has been adapted from distinguished programs that include the Stanford BioDesign program
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Duration statement for Tier 3 innovation fellowship.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: applicants need to submit a cover letter, resume, letter of recommendation and signed intellectual property waiver documents.
claims.claimText: Application requires cover letter, resume, LOR, and signed IP waiver.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Application pathway info for Tier 3 fellowship.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: please contact our Innovations team at InnovationPrograms@BaptistHealth.net

claims.quote: A rolling application process is now open. August 1, 2025, is the deadline to be considered for the September 2025 cohort.
claims.claimText: Rolling application; August 1, 2025 deadline for September 2025 cohort.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Application timeline detail for Tier 3 fellowship.

claims.claimText: Navigation references a Physician Recruitment section.

claims.quote: Willingness and ability to attend 10 in-person, four-hour sessions scheduled from September to June in Miami, Florida, and to participate in hybrid team-based sessions approximately six hours per month.
claims.claimText: Attendance commitment: 10 in-person four-hour sessions Sept-June in Miami plus ~6 hours/month hybrid team sessions.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Time/location commitment for Tier 3 non-clinical innovation fellowship.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured residency/degree/employment bullets but skipped the attendance/time-commitment bullet from the eligibility list.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Support from immediate supervisor and, if applicable, external employer.
claims.claimText: Applicants must have support from immediate supervisor (and external employer if applicable).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Employer-support eligibility constraint for the Tier 3 working-professional fellowship.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 omitted this bullet from the eligibility list.

claims.quote: If you are an external candidate not employed at Baptist Health and do not have a Baptist Health email, select the link on the bottom left to complete a brief questionnaire. Please allow 24 hours to receive your login information, direct link to access the application and additional documentation via email.
claims.claimText: External (non-Baptist Health) candidates complete a brief questionnaire and receive login info within 24 hours.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Application pathway mechanic for external (non-employee) candidates of the Tier 3 fellowship.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured documents and rolling deadline only; missed the bifurcated internal/external pathway and 24-hour login process.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Passion or interest in healthcare, innovation and entrepreneurship.
